install_cmds:
python3 <<'DLEOF'
import torchvision
print('Downloading MNIST...')
torchvision.datasets.MNIST('/data/mnist', train=True, download=True)
torchvision.datasets.MNIST('/data/mnist', train=False, download=True)
print('Downloading CIFAR-10...')
torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar10', train=True, download=True)
torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar10', train=False, download=True)
print('Downloading Fashion-MNIST...')
torchvision.datasets.FashionMNIST('/data/fmnist', train=True, download=True)
torchvision.datasets.FashionMNIST('/data/fmnist', train=False, download=True)
print('All datasets downloaded OK')
DLEOF
